title: Anthropic Just Released Claude Sonnet 5 and it's VERY IMPRESSIVE!
summary: Cole Medin reviews Anthropic's Claude Sonnet 5 as an impressive model offering excellent value. The video frames the model as a significant advancement and part of broader AI transformation across industries.
writeup: Cole Medin reviews Anthropic's Claude Sonnet 5, presenting it as a significant advancement among large language models and a strong value option. The video frames the release within a broader wave of AI transformation across industries. The main takeaway is Medin's assessment that the model is impressive and worth attention for those tracking new model releases.
